message:
fix: Enforce sink token protection + add TUI dashboard

Two enhancements to complete the optimization suite:

1. Fix "Sink vs Prune" Conflict (Critical Safety)
   - Added MIN_SINK_PROTECTION constant (4 tokens)
   - getPruneCandidates() now enforces minimum protection even if
     protect_range=0 is passed, preventing accidental sink pruning
   - Added "sink protection enforced" test to verify safety
   - Without this fix, model would collapse into gibberish if
     attention sink tokens were accidentally pruned

2. TUI Dashboard ("Brain Scan")
   - New src/dashboard.zig with ANSI-based terminal UI
   - Displays: Hippocampus state, Fusion status, N-gram hit rate,
     KV cache usage, Memory pressure, Pruning stats
   - Thread-safe atomic state updates
   - Rate-limited rendering (500ms default)
   - Graceful degradation with partial component attachment
   - Compact single-line status format alternative
